title: sida anoda
intro: Sida anoda, also known as the country mallow or prickly mallow, is a plant species that belongs to the mallow family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various skin conditions such as eczema, acne, and dermatitis due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant's health benefits also extend to reducing fever, soothing wounds, and easing digestive issues. Sida anoda can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or topical ointment, and it is commonly used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
